summary: 25 unread emails this morning. Most urgent: three LifeMD emails — your prescription renewal needs action and your appointment is confirmed for this Thursday, April 10 at 8:45am CDT. Your Google Fi bill of $168.32 auto-pays April 13. Heads up: that Texas vehicle registration notice from January is still sitting here — your 2014 Mazda expired in December and is now 3+ months overdue.

items.subject: Action Required: It's time to renew your prescription, Ryan
items.snippet: Complete a renewal survey to avoid any interruption in your treatment.

items.subject: Your appointment with LifeMD is confirmed
items.snippet: Your appointment is booked for April 10 at 8:45am CDT — this Thursday.

items.subject: Your appointment has been rescheduled
items.snippet: Your LifeMD appointment has been rescheduled — log in to the patient portal to view the updated details.

items.subject: Your Google Fi monthly statement
items.snippet: Your April 2 statement totals $168.32 — auto-payment scheduled for April 13, 2026.

items.subject: It's time to renew your registration
items.snippet: Your 2014 Mazda (VIN ending 1256) registration expired December 2025 — this notice has been sitting since January and is now 3+ months overdue.

items.subject: UAS Registration Renewal Reminder
items.snippet: Your drone UAS registration will expire within 180 days — renew at FAADroneZone to stay legal.

items.subject: Information about automatic renewal
items.snippet: Your Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack 12-month membership is set to renew automatically.

items.subject: Mrs. Davis' Class Easter Party Photos
items.snippet: Class celebrated Easter Thursday with snacks and a donut Jesus tomb craft while reading Luke 24 — photos included.

items.subject: For members only: new NASASpaceflight post
items.snippet: Members-only update: Flight 13 Ship 40 awaiting Ship 39's return for Static Fire before its cryo test.

items.subject: Order #69301 confirmed
items.snippet: Your NASASpaceflight shop order (Artemis item) is confirmed and being prepped for shipment.

items.subject: Thank you for your Steam purchase!
items.snippet: Steam purchase confirmed and items added to your library — note it was addressed to bubbyrck@yahoo.com.

items.subject: Success, we got your order.
items.snippet: Your Taco Bell mobile order is confirmed — give your name at the drive-thru.

items.subject: Thanks for placing a mobile order!
items.snippet: Your McDonald's mobile order has been placed and is being prepared.

items.subject: Your Daily Digest for Sat, 4/4 is ready to view
items.snippet: You have 1 mailpiece and 1 inbound package arriving Saturday, April 4.

items.subject: We're LIVE: From "I Ask ChatGPT Things" to 10 Hours Saved / Wk
items.snippet: AI productivity newsletter with a new podcast episode on saving 10 hours/week with AI tools, plus beginner episode picks.
